texto: Anarchists have a 'bad name' in the media, not because they can point to one indiscriminate massacre by anarchists--there have been none--but because the one thing holders of power fear is that they personally should be held responsible for their own actions
explicacao: Orientação direta de Stuart Christie sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. A afirmação “Anarchists have a 'bad name' in the media, not because they can point to one indiscriminate massa…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a coragem, anarchism, politics, útil em momentos de politics.
